hero.headline: See the pattern your mind keeps repeating.
hero.subheadline: AI journaling for self-awareness: spot recurring thoughts, understand when they show up, and notice the pattern sooner next time.
hero.social_proof: See exactly how MindMirror turns one thought into a recurring-pattern insight.

f1.title: Voice-first capture
f1.body: Start with voice or text. MindMirror is being shaped around getting thoughts out quickly, not writing perfect journal entries.

f2.title: Memory that builds
f2.body: Every saved reflection becomes evidence. One entry gives a mirror; three starts early signals; ten unlocks a clearer pattern map.

f3.title: Pattern detection
f3.body: MindMirror looks for topics, emotions, repeated phrases, and trigger situations so reflection becomes useful before the thought pattern repeats.

f4.title: Honest pattern insight
f4.body: Less vague positivity. More: 'This keeps appearing when you talk about work decisions.'

f5.title: Prepare for real life
f5.body: The long-term direction is a simple daily surface: what is coming up, what usually happens, and how to prepare differently.

f6.title: Your data, forever
f6.body: Export everything anytime. Your thoughts belong to you.

social_proof.quote1: Most journaling tools help you record thoughts. MindMirror is built to show which thoughts keep repeating and where they show up.
social_proof.quote2: The quiz turns vague overthinking into a simple self-awareness profile.
social_proof.quote3: The funnel is intentionally simple: understand the promise, preview the result, then decide.

pricing.empty_state: No plans synced yet. In Stripe, tag products with metadata foundation = true, add price lookup_key and metadata internal_id, then run npm run stripe:sync.

features.patterns: Private mirror and recurring thought read
features.insights: Follow-up questions that go one layer deeper
features.alerts: Future pattern alerts when a topic repeats

faq.q1: Is this just another journaling app?
faq.a1: No. Most journaling apps store your thoughts. MindMirror analyzes reflections for repeated topics, emotions, phrases, and situations. It's the difference between a diary and a mirror.
faq.q2: How does the pattern detection work?
faq.a2: MindMirror analyzes entries for topics, emotions, repeated phrases, goals, and trigger situations. The current beta gives a private mirror and follow-up questions; the long-term product will get better at showing what keeps coming up over time.
faq.q3: Do I have to write or type anything?
faq.a3: No. You can use browser dictation or type. The core experience is designed around getting the thought out quickly instead of forcing a writing habit.
faq.a4: You can cancel through Stripe where subscription billing applies. During beta, we will keep the checkout status and refund terms clear before you pay.
faq.a5: Your entries are private to your account. We do not sell journal content or share it for advertising. If AI analysis is enabled, entries may be processed by an AI provider only to generate your mirror and follow-up questions.
faq.q6: Does this replace therapy or counselling?
faq.a6: Absolutely not. This product is not a replacement for therapy, counselling, or professional mental health support. The goal is to help people reflect, understand their thoughts more clearly, and build self-awareness between real-world support. If you're struggling, we strongly encourage speaking with a qualified counsellor, therapist, doctor, or crisis support service.

how_it_works.title: How it works
how_it_works.subtitle: The first test is simple: can the promise of better self-awareness and recurring thought recognition make people want early access?
how_it_works.step1_body: Answer a few questions about where recurring thoughts show up: anxiety, business, sport, relationships, habits, or self-awareness.
how_it_works.step2_body: See a sample MindMirror result with a possible thought pattern, where it may appear next, and what it could help you notice.
how_it_works.step3_body: If the result feels useful, continue to the early-access checkout. The product status is shown clearly before payment.

meta.title: MindMirror
meta.description: A voice-first AI journaling product designed to build self-awareness by detecting recurring thoughts over time.
